opening_visual_hook_spec.hook_goal: 0-3 秒直接让观众明白冲突：AI 给 KPI 看似完整但没法指导下一步。
opening_visual_hook_spec.viewer_feeling: 被一句判断拍醒，然后立刻看到真实录屏不是空讲。
opening_visual_hook_spec.main_question: 这些指标回来以后，下一条到底改哪里？
visual_motion: 0-1s: video_1 原始输入局部推近
1-3s: 大字叠加“AI 给 KPI 没用”
3-8s: 保留屏录并高亮播放/点赞/客资
opening_visual_hook_spec.text_density: opening max 1 big line + 1 subtitle line
must_not_be: API human monologue replacing screen evidence
opening_visual_hook_spec.validation_rule: 5 秒内必须同时出现冲突判断和真实录屏证据；若只剩标题卡则 opening failed。
blocked_if: hook text becomes data_flywheel jargon first
